products.name: RAA Web
products.description: Core design system for raa.com.au, My Account, and Quote to Buy applications

products.name: Taskly
products.description: White label task management application built as a third-party product

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Main call-to-action button used across all RAA web products. Yellow background with dark text. Used for primary actions like Next, Submit, Buy now, Get a quote.

variants.name: Default
variants.description: Yellow (#FFD100) background, dark text, 48px height, 24px horizontal padding, 8px border radius

variants.name: With Arrow
variants.description: Same as default with a right-pointing arrow icon after the label. Used for progressive navigation (Next, Continue)

variants.name: With Checkmark
variants.description: Same as default with a checkmark icon before the label. Used for confirmation actions (This is correct, Confirm)

variants.name: Disabled
variants.description: Grey background (#E5E5E5), muted text, no pointer cursor. Used when form validation has not passed

variants.name: Loading
variants.description: Yellow background with a spinner replacing the label. Used after submission while waiting for server response

components.usage: Use for the single most important action on any screen. Only one primary button per view. For secondary actions use the Secondary Button or Text Link.
components.accessibility: Minimum touch target 44x44px. Must have visible focus ring on keyboard navigation. Label must describe the action, not just 'Click here'.

changelog.description: usedIn field added showing which products use this component
Visual component preview generated from design token values
Atlassian-style visual overhaul with tabbed component pages, scroll spy, and updated colour scheme
Component added to design system with visual preview and documentation

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: Outlined button for secondary actions. White background with dark border. Used for actions like View details, Save quote, Show Card.

variants.name: Default
variants.description: White background, 1px dark border (#1A1A1A), dark text, 44px height

variants.name: With External Icon
variants.description: Same as default with external link icon. Used for links that open in a new tab (RAA Rewards, Download the app)

variants.name: Small
variants.description: 36px height, 14px font size. Used in compact layouts like product cards

variants.name: Disabled
variants.description: Light grey border, muted text, no interaction

components.usage: Use for secondary actions that don't compete with the primary CTA. Can appear multiple times on a page.
components.accessibility: Same requirements as Primary Button.

changelog.description: usedIn field added showing which products use this component
Visual component preview generated from design token values
Atlassian-style visual overhaul with tabbed component pages, scroll spy, and updated colour scheme
Component added to design system with visual preview and documentation

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Standard single-line text input with label above. Used for email, name, address, phone number, and other text entry.

variants.name: Default
variants.description: Empty state with label above and optional placeholder text

variants.name: Filled
variants.description: Contains user input, label remains above

variants.name: Error
variants.description: Red border, red validation icon on right side, error message below in red text

variants.name: Success
variants.description: Green border with green checkmark icon on right side

variants.name: Disabled
variants.description: Grey background, non-editable, muted label

variants.name: With Prefix
variants.description: Dollar sign or other prefix inside the field on the left side. Used for currency inputs (Sum insured)

variants.name: With Calendar Icon
variants.description: Calendar picker icon on right side. Used for date of birth and start date fields

components.usage: Always pair with a label above the field. Never use placeholder text as a replacement for a label. Show validation on blur, not on every keystroke.
components.accessibility: Label must be programmatically associated with the input via htmlFor/id. Error messages must be linked via aria-describedby.

changelog.description: usedIn field added showing which products use this component
Visual component preview generated from design token values
Atlassian-style visual overhaul with tabbed component pages, scroll spy, and updated colour scheme
Component added to design system with visual preview and documentation

components.name: Dropdown Select
components.description: Native select dropdown with label above and info icon. Used for structured choices like Building type, Roof material, Year built, Excess amount.

variants.name: Default
variants.description: Shows selected value with chevron down indicator

variants.name: With Info Icon
variants.description: Small info (i) icon next to the label that opens a tooltip on click

variants.name: Error
variants.description: Red border with error message below

variants.name: Disabled
variants.description: Grey background, non-interactive

components.usage: Use for 4+ options from a predefined list. For 2-3 options, use Radio Card instead.
components.accessibility: Must use native select element for screen reader compatibility.

changelog.description: usedIn field added showing which products use this component
Visual component preview generated from design token values
Atlassian-style visual overhaul with tabbed component pages, scroll spy, and updated colour scheme
Component added to design system with visual preview and documentation

components.name: Radio Card
components.description: Large tappable card-style radio button. Shows a radio circle on the left with text label. Used for binary or small-set choices like Yes/No, cover type selection, gender, title.

variants.name: Default
variants.description: White background, 1px border, radio circle on left, text label

variants.name: Selected
variants.description: Teal/green (#0D9488) border and radio fill, light green (#F0FDFA) background

variants.name: Horizontal Group
variants.description: Two cards side by side (Yes/No pattern). 50/50 width split

variants.name: Vertical Group
variants.description: Full-width stacked cards (cover type selection: Home and Contents, Home only, Contents only)

variants.name: With Description
variants.description: Primary label with secondary description text below. Used for address confirmation

variants.name: Multi-option Horizontal
variants.description: Row of 3-5 smaller cards (Title: Mr, Ms, Mrs, Miss, Other)

components.usage: Use for 2-5 mutually exclusive options where the full option text needs to be visible. For longer lists use Dropdown Select.
components.accessibility: Must use radio input elements. Group must have a fieldset with legend.

changelog.description: usedIn field added showing which products use this component
Visual component preview generated from design token values
Atlassian-style visual overhaul with tabbed component pages, scroll spy, and updated colour scheme
Component added to design system with visual preview and documentation

components.name: Checkbox
components.description: Standard checkbox with text label. Used for consent agreements, marketing opt-in, and multi-select options.

variants.name: Default Unchecked
variants.description: Empty square checkbox with text label to the right

variants.name: Checked
variants.description: Blue (#2563EB) filled checkbox with white checkmark

variants.name: Error
variants.description: Red border on checkbox, red error text below ('You must check this to continue')

variants.name: With Card
variants.description: Checkbox inside a bordered card with longer descriptive text. Used for legal agreements

components.usage: Use for non-exclusive selections and consent/agreement checkboxes. For single Yes/No choices prefer Radio Card.
components.accessibility: Label must be clickable to toggle the checkbox.

changelog.description: usedIn field added showing which products use this component
Visual component preview generated from design token values
Atlassian-style visual overhaul with tabbed component pages, scroll spy, and updated colour scheme
Component added to design system with visual preview and documentation

components.name: Toggle Switch
components.description: On/off toggle switch. Used for optional add-on covers in the Quote to Buy flow (Accidental Damage Cover, Pet Cover).

variants.name: Off
variants.description: Grey track, white thumb on left

variants.name: On
variants.description: Teal (#0D9488) track, white thumb on right

components.usage: Use for optional features that can be independently toggled on or off. Always pair with a label and description of what the toggle controls.
components.accessibility: Must use role=switch with aria-checked state.

changelog.description: usedIn field added showing which products use this component
Visual component preview generated from design token values
Atlassian-style visual overhaul with tabbed component pages, scroll spy, and updated colour scheme
Component added to design system with visual preview and documentation

components.name: Stepper Navigation
components.description: Vertical step indicator used in the Quote to Buy flow. Shows numbered steps with labels, connected by a vertical line. Steps show completed (green checkmark), current (highlighted number), and upcoming (grey number) states.

variants.name: 5-Step Quote Flow
variants.description: General information > Your home > Your contents > Policy holders > Your quote

variants.name: 5-Step Summary Flow
variants.description: Insurance history > Finance details > Contact details > Summary > Payment

components.usage: Used only in multi-step flows. Positioned on the left side of the content area. Shows progress and allows back-navigation to completed steps.
components.accessibility: Must use aria-current=step for the active step. Completed steps should be navigable links.

changelog.description: usedIn field added showing which products use this component
Visual component preview generated from design token values
Atlassian-style visual overhaul with tabbed component pages, scroll spy, and updated colour scheme
Component added to design system with visual preview and documentation

components.name: Progress Banner
components.description: Yellow banner at the top of Quote to Buy pages showing the current step number and step title. Full-width yellow (#FFD100) background with centred white text.

variants.name: Default
variants.description: Step X of 5 label above, large step title below. Yellow background

components.usage: Appears at the top of every Quote to Buy page. Always shows the step number and the section name.
components.accessibility: Should be an h1 or contain the page heading for screen readers.

changelog.description: usedIn field added showing which products use this component
Visual component preview generated from design token values
Atlassian-style visual overhaul with tabbed component pages, scroll spy, and updated colour scheme
Component added to design system with visual preview and documentation

components.name: Sidebar Navigation
components.description: Left sidebar navigation used in My Account. Collapsible sections with chevron indicators. Active item shown with a left border indicator.

variants.name: Default
variants.description: Vertical list of navigation items. Top-level items with optional expand/collapse

variants.name: Expanded Section
variants.description: Section open showing child items indented below. Left border bar on active item

variants.name: Collapsed Section
variants.description: Section closed, chevron pointing down

components.usage: Used in My Account for section navigation. Sections include My Account home, My details, My products, My claims, My member benefits.
components.accessibility: Must use nav element with aria-label. Expandable sections must use aria-expanded.

changelog.description: usedIn field added showing which products use this component
Visual component preview generated from design token values
Atlassian-style visual overhaul with tabbed component pages, scroll spy, and updated colour scheme
Component added to design system with visual preview and documentation

components.name: Header Bar
components.description: Top navigation bar. Two variants: the public site header with full nav, and the simplified Quote/My Account header.

variants.name: Public Site
variants.description: RAA logo left, primary nav (Membership, Motor, Home, Travel) centre, Contact Us dropdown + Search + Account icon right

variants.name: Quote Flow
variants.description: RAA logo left, 'Home Insurance Quote' label centre, 'Need help' link + help icon right

variants.name: My Account
variants.description: RAA logo left, 'My Account' label, 'Need help' link + 'Log out' button right

components.usage: Every page must have a header. The variant is determined by the application context.
components.accessibility: Logo must link to homepage. Nav items must be keyboard navigable.

changelog.description: usedIn field added showing which products use this component
Visual component preview generated from design token values
Atlassian-style visual overhaul with tabbed component pages, scroll spy, and updated colour scheme
Component added to design system with visual preview and documentation

components.name: Footer
components.description: Page footer with legal links and copyright. Two variants: full public site footer and simplified application footer.

variants.name: Public Site
variants.description: Category columns (Membership, Motor, Home, Travel) with link lists, bottom row with legal links and social icons

variants.name: Application
variants.description: Single row with Privacy Policy, Cookie Policy, Terms and Conditions links, plus copyright text

components.usage: Every page must have a footer. Application pages use the simplified variant.
components.accessibility: Links must have underline or other visual indicator. External links must have external link icon.

changelog.description: usedIn field added showing which products use this component
Visual component preview generated from design token values
Atlassian-style visual overhaul with tabbed component pages, scroll spy, and updated colour scheme
Component added to design system with visual preview and documentation

components.name: Product Card
components.description: Card displaying a member's product or policy. Shows an icon, product name, product/policy number, and a View details button. Used in My Account home and My Products pages.

variants.name: Road Service
variants.description: Road service icon, product name, product number, View details button

variants.name: Home Insurance
variants.description: Home icon, address as title, 'Home and/or Contents Insurance', policy number, View details button

variants.name: Car Insurance
variants.description: Car icon, vehicle make/model and rego as title, 'Car Insurance: Standard Comprehensive', policy number, View details button

components.usage: Used to display each product/policy a member holds. Always includes the View details secondary button.
components.accessibility: Card should be a semantic grouping. View details link must include the product name in its accessible label.

changelog.description: usedIn field added showing which products use this component
Visual component preview generated from design token values
Atlassian-style visual overhaul with tabbed component pages, scroll spy, and updated colour scheme
Component added to design system with visual preview and documentation

components.name: Quick Action Card
components.description: Compact card with icon, title, and short description. Used on the My Account home page for common actions (Change payment details, Update contact details, Make a claim, See competitions).

variants.name: Default
variants.description: Icon left, title and description right, full-width clickable area

components.usage: Use for quick-access actions on dashboard pages. Maximum 4-6 per group.
components.accessibility: Entire card must be a clickable link.

components.name: Feature Card
components.description: Larger card with illustration, heading, body text, and CTA button. Used on the public homepage for feature promotion (Learners practice test, RAA Rewards, Get live fuel prices).

variants.name: Default
variants.description: Illustration top, heading, body text, yellow CTA button bottom

variants.name: With Image
variants.description: Photo image top, heading, body text, external link. Used for member benefits

components.usage: Use for promoting features or benefits. 3-column grid on desktop.
components.accessibility: Illustrations must have alt text describing the feature.

components.name: Promo Banner
components.description: Full-width promotional banner with image, heading, body text, and yellow CTA button. Used for cross-sell (Get a quote online, Save with RAA Rewards, Download the app).

variants.name: With Image Right
variants.description: Text and CTA left, decorative image right

variants.name: Yellow Background
variants.description: Full yellow background banner. Used for fuel savings promotions

variants.name: Image Background
variants.description: Full background image with overlaid text and CTA. Used for 'Send this quote to yourself'

components.usage: Maximum one per page section. Do not stack multiple promo banners.
components.accessibility: Background images must not convey essential information.

changelog.description: usedIn field added showing which products use this component

components.name: Accordion
components.description: Expandable/collapsible content section with a header and plus/minus toggle icon. Used for FAQs, legal information, summary sections (About your home, About your contents).

variants.name: Default Closed
variants.description: Header text with plus (+) icon on right

variants.name: Open
variants.description: Header text with minus (-) icon, content visible below

variants.name: FAQ Group
variants.description: Multiple accordions stacked under a section heading

components.usage: Use for content that most users don't need to see on every visit. FAQs, legal text, detailed breakdowns.
components.accessibility: Must use button for the toggle. Content region must use aria-hidden when collapsed.

changelog.description: usedIn field added showing which products use this component
Visual component preview generated from design token values
Atlassian-style visual overhaul with tabbed component pages, scroll spy, and updated colour scheme

components.name: Alert Banner
components.description: Full-width notification banner with icon, heading, and body text. Used for warnings, information, and error states.

variants.name: Warning
variants.description: Yellow (#FEF3C7) background, warning triangle icon, dark text. Used for coverage limitations and important notices

variants.name: Error
variants.description: Red (#FEE2E2) background, exclamation icon, red text. Used for validation errors that block progression and call-to-action blocks (Please call us)

variants.name: Information
variants.description: Blue (#EFF6FF) background, info circle icon, dark text. Used for policy information and tips

variants.name: Success
variants.description: Green (#F0FDF4) background, checkmark icon. Used for confirmed actions (Address confirmed)

components.usage: Place at the point where the information is relevant. Warning banners for coverage limitations should appear after the triggering selection.
components.accessibility: Must use role=alert for dynamic alerts. Static information banners use role=note.

changelog.description: usedIn field added showing which products use this component
Visual component preview generated from design token values
Atlassian-style visual overhaul with tabbed component pages, scroll spy, and updated colour scheme
Component added to design system with visual preview and documentation

components.name: Info Tooltip
components.description: Small info (i) icon that reveals additional context on click. Used next to form labels and section headings (Building type info, Excess explained, Under construction explained).

variants.name: Icon Only
variants.description: Small blue (i) circle icon. Reveals tooltip or expandable content on click

variants.name: With Link
variants.description: Info icon followed by a text link (e.g. 'Excess explained', 'Under construction explained')

components.usage: Use when a label needs additional context that isn't essential for all users. Don't hide critical information in tooltips.
components.accessibility: Must be keyboard accessible. Tooltip content must be programmatically associated.

changelog.description: usedIn field added showing which products use this component
Visual component preview generated from design token values
Atlassian-style visual overhaul with tabbed component pages, scroll spy, and updated colour scheme
Component added to design system with visual preview and documentation

components.name: Chat Widget
components.description: Floating chat button in the bottom-right corner. Opens a live chat window. Present on most pages.

variants.name: Default
variants.description: Blue circular button with chat icon in bottom-right corner

components.usage: Present on all pages except during payment processing.
components.accessibility: Must have accessible label 'Open live chat'.

components.name: Mascot Tip
components.description: Small character mascot illustration with a speech bubble containing helpful tips. Used throughout the Quote to Buy flow to provide contextual guidance.

variants.name: Default
variants.description: Mascot avatar image with a light purple speech bubble containing tip text

components.usage: Use for contextual tips that guide users through complex decisions. Position beside the related form field.
components.accessibility: Tip content must be accessible to screen readers. Image is decorative (empty alt).

components.name: Quote Summary Card
components.description: Large summary card showing the insurance quote result. Displays product icon, cover type, price (monthly and yearly), quote reference, start date, address, excess amounts, and discount savings.

variants.name: Quote Result
variants.description: Full quote summary with price, reference, details. Appears on the Your Quote page

variants.name: Policy Summary
variants.description: Same layout with 'Ok me, here is your summary' heading. Appears on the Summary page

components.usage: Appears once per quote flow at the quote and summary stages.
components.accessibility: Price must be clearly associated with the cover type for screen readers.

components.name: Cover Option Card
components.description: Card for optional insurance add-ons. Shows a toggle switch, cover name, description, excess amount, and expandable key information section.

variants.name: With Toggle
variants.description: Toggle switch left, cover name, description, price/excess right. Used for Accidental Damage Cover, Pet Cover

variants.name: With Radio Options
variants.description: Radio cards below for selecting coverage limits ($2000 or $5000 per claim)

components.usage: Used in the Contents cover step of Quote to Buy for optional add-on selection.
components.accessibility: Toggle state must be announced. Price changes must be communicated.

components.name: Coverage Grid
components.description: Grid of coverage items showing what's included in the policy. Each item has an icon and a two-line description. 3-column layout.

variants.name: Default
variants.description: 3x3 grid. Icon top, bold title, grey description. Items: Fire damage, Flood and Storm damage, Claims handled in SA, Burglary, Replacement of locks, Accommodation, Loss of rent, Motor burnout, Glass breakage

components.usage: Used on the Your Quote page to show what the policy covers.
components.accessibility: Icons must have meaningful alt text.

variants.name: With Yellow Border
variants.description: Same as default with a 3px yellow left border on the container

components.usage: Use for displaying structured data summaries. Not for large datasets.
components.accessibility: Must use a proper table or definition list structure.
